author: terencechain
content:
i have Builder-API fully working with prysm (without auth)
all these blocks are from builder api via buildooor
<@1386598056320831509> the branch is here if you want to try: https://github.com/OffchainLabs/prysm/pull/16961
i want to test auth next, does buildoor already support it?
<@808969530608451584> its' not clear to me why dora shows some of these payloads missing but they seem to arrive and processed on time on all the nodes 🙁
